mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, policy_code, policy_name, required_capabilities, status, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time FROM ai_model_route_policy WHERE del_flag = '0' AND (policy_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR policy_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_model_route_policy WHERE del_flag = '0' AND policy_code = #{policyCode} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_agent WHERE del_flag = '0' AND model_selection_mode = 'POLICY' AND route_policy_id = #{policyId}
